mainEntity.name: Cost comparison: In-house vs agency AI optimization for Denver firms?
mainEntity.text: Cost comparison: In-house vs agency AI optimization for Denver firms?

acceptedAnswer.text: In-house: $50k/year staff; agency: $15k-$30k with tools/expertise. Agencies yield 2x faster results.

suggestedAnswer.text: Denver: Agencies handle multi-AI tracking; in-house suits large firms. Factor training costs; ROI higher with pros per Clutch data.

name: In-House vs Agency Costs in Denver
